
# Classification

## **1. Research Data Repositories (Publication & Preservation)**  
These systems store *final*, curated, publishable datasets.

| Technology | Classification | Notes |
|-----------|----------------|-------|
| **Dataverse** | Research data repository | Strong metadata, DOI, curation workflows. |
| **DANS Data Stations** | Research data repository | Dataverse-based, strong metadata schemas. |
| **4TU.ResearchData (Djehuty)** | Research data repository | RDF support, strong search. |
| **Zenodo (Invenio)** | General-purpose repository | Limited metadata flexibility. |
| **SURF Data Repository (Invenio)** | Institutional repository | Embargo support, curation workflows. |
| **Figshare** | Proprietary repository | Strong previewing, weaker metadata control. |
| **OSF, Dryad, DSpace, Mendeley Data** | General-purpose repositories | Mentioned but not deeply evaluated. |
| **Yoda** | Repository + workflow layer | Built on iRODS; not openly accessible. |

**Document citation:**  
“Repositories are used to store published data (open and closed)… We investigated Figshare, Invenio, Dataverse, Djehuty…”  


---

## **2. Metadata Portals / Catalogs / FAIRification Tools**

| Technology | Classification | Notes |
|-----------|----------------|-------|
| **FAIR Data Station** | FAIR metadata creation & RDF generator | Pre‑repository metadata tool. |
| **CKAN** | Metadata portal / open data catalog | Not suited for large files; strong search. |
| **Molgenis** | Schema-based metadata catalog | Strong in life sciences; relational backend. |
| **MetaVox (Nextcloud plugin)** | Early‑stage metadata annotation | Schema-based metadata on files/folders. |

**Document citation:**  
“CKAN can be best described as a metadata portal for publishing information about datasets.”  


---

## **3. Storage Systems (Raw Data Storage)**

| Technology | Classification | Notes |
|-----------|----------------|-------|
| **Object Store (S3-like)** | Scalable object storage | Minimal metadata; needs microservices. |
| **dCache** | Large-scale file/tape storage | Limited metadata; used in physics. |
| **Nextcloud / ResearchDrive** | Collaborative file storage | Metadata only via plugins. |

**Document citation:**  
“Object store… metadata can be added ONLY during upload… very limited.”  


---

## **4. Data Management & Orchestration Layers (Middleware)**  
These systems unify storage, metadata, and policies.

| Technology | Classification | Notes |
|-----------|----------------|-------|
| **iRODS** | Data management middleware | Metadata, policies, automation. |
| **Rucio** | Distributed data management | Designed for physics; rule-based replication. |
| **Globus** | File transfer & automation | Strong for large data movement. |
| **Starfish** | File system analytics & policy engine | Proprietary; metadata from scans. |
| **SURF Research Data Connector** | Integration middleware | Bridges Nextcloud → repositories. |
| **Mango / iBridges** | User interfaces for iRODS | Improve usability. |

**Document citation:**  
“iRODS is an open source data management framework… combines data storage, metadata and a strong policy engine.”  


---

## **5. Workflow & Compute Integration Tools**

| Technology | Classification | Notes |
|-----------|----------------|-------|
| **Nextflow, Snakemake, Galaxy, Kubernetes** | Workflow engines | Mentioned as integrations with Molgenis. |
| **Neptune + Data Access Broker** | Emerging workflow-integrated metadata tools | Under development. |

**Document citation:**  
“Molgenis… can be interfaced with workflow management systems such as nextflow, Snakemake, Galaxy…”  


---

## **6. Collaboration Platforms**

| Technology | Classification | Notes |
|-----------|----------------|-------|
| **Nextcloud** | Collaboration & file sharing | Metadata via MetaVox; integrates with SURF RDC. |

**Document citation:**  
“Nextcloud is an open-source on-premise content collaboration platform… MetaVox allows research teams to manage metadata.”  


---

# 🧩 **How These Categories Fit Together in an RDM Architecture**

Here’s a conceptual map:

### **A. Early-stage research (active data)**
- Nextcloud + MetaVox  
- FAIR Data Station  
- CKAN (as metadata registry)  
- iRODS (as backend)  
- Object Store / dCache  

### **B. Orchestration & automation**
- iRODS  
- Rucio  
- Globus  
- Starfish  
- SURF Research Data Connector  

### **C. Publication & preservation**
- Dataverse  
- DANS Data Stations  
- 4TU.ResearchData  
- SURF Data Repository  
- Zenodo  
- Figshare  
- Yoda  

```{mermaid}

%%| label: fig-rdm-ecosystem
%%| fig-cap: Classification of RDM Technologies Across the Data Lifecycle
%%| fig-align: center
%%{init: {
  "look": "handDrawn",
  "flowchart": { "htmlLabels": false }
}}%%

flowchart TD

    %% --- Users ---
    subgraph Users["Users"]
        RESEARCHERS["Researchers"]
        ADMINS["Data Stewards / Sysadmins"]
    end

    %% --- Active Research Layer ---
    subgraph Active["Active Research & Collaboration"]
        NC["Nextcloud / ResearchDrive"]
        MV["MetaVox<br>(Schema-based Metadata)"]
        FDS["FAIR Data Station<br>(FAIR Metadata Creation)"]
        CKAN["CKAN<br>(Metadata Portal)"]
        MOLG["Molgenis<br>(Schema-based Catalog)"]
    end

    %% --- Storage Layer ---
    subgraph Storage["Storage Systems"]
        OBJ["Object Store"]
        DCACHE["dCache"]
        FS["Local / HPC Filesystems"]
    end

    %% --- Orchestration Layer ---
    subgraph Orchestration["Data Management & Orchestration"]
        IRODS["iRODS<br>(Policy Engine + Metadata)"]
        RUCIO["Rucio<br>(Distributed Data Mgmt)"]
        GLOB["Globus<br>(Transfer + Automation)"]
        STAR["Starfish<br>(FS Analytics + Policies)"]
        RDC["SURF Research Data Connector"]
        MANGO["Mango / iBridges<br>(iRODS UI Layer)"]
    end

    %% --- Publication Layer ---
    subgraph Publication["Publication & Preservation Repositories"]
        DV["Dataverse / DANS Data Stations"]
        INV["Invenio / SDR / Zenodo"]
        FIG["Figshare"]
        DJE["Djehuty / 4TU.ResearchData"]
        YODA["Yoda<br>(iRODS-based Repository)"]
    end

    %% --- User Interactions ---
    RESEARCHERS -->|"collaborate / annotate"| NC
    RESEARCHERS -->|"create FAIR metadata"| FDS
    RESEARCHERS -->|"search / discover"| CKAN
    ADMINS -->|"configure / manage"| IRODS

    %% --- Data Flow: Active → Storage ---
    NC -->|"store files"| OBJ
    NC -->|"store files"| DCACHE
    NC -->|"store files"| FS
    MV -->|"attach metadata"| NC

    %% --- Data Flow: Storage → Orchestration ---
    OBJ -->|"managed by"| IRODS
    DCACHE -->|"indexed by"| STAR
    FS -->|"transferred via"| GLOB
    IRODS -->|"policy-driven workflows"| MANGO
    IRODS -->|"integrated via"| RDC

    %% --- Data Flow: Orchestration → Publication ---
    IRODS -->|"curated datasets"| YODA
    RDC -->|"publish"| DV
    RDC -->|"publish"| INV
    RDC -->|"publish"| DJE
    RDC -->|"publish"| FIG

    %% --- Highlight key nodes ---
    style DV fill:#d8f3dc,stroke:#1b4332,color:#1b4332
    style CKAN fill:#d8f3dc,stroke:#1b4332,color:#1b4332
    style IRODS fill:#d8f3dc,stroke:#1b4332,color:#1b4332
    style NC fill:#d8f3dc,stroke:#1b4332,color:#1b4332
    style FDS fill:#d8f3dc,stroke:#1b4332,color:#1b4332

    %% --- Link styles ---
    linkStyle default labelPosition:0.5, align:top;
```
## Decision Tree

```{mermaid}
%%{init: {
  "look": "handDrawn",
  "flowchart": { "htmlLabels": false }
}}%%

flowchart TD

    %% Root
    START["What do you need to do?"]

    %% High-level branches
    START --> A1["Store or collaborate on active research data"]
    START --> A2["Manage storage, automate workflows, or orchestrate data movement"]
    START --> A3["Create or manage metadata during research"]
    START --> A4["Publish, preserve, or share final datasets"]
    START --> A5["Move very large data between systems"]

    %% --- Branch A1: Active Research Storage ---
    A1 --> B1["Do you need user-friendly collaboration?"]
    B1 -->|"Yes"| NC["Nextcloud / ResearchDrive"]
    B1 -->|"With structured metadata?"| MV["Nextcloud + MetaVox"]

    A1 --> B2["Do you need HPC-scale raw storage?"]
    B2 -->|"Large files, physics-style"| DCACHE["dCache"]
    B2 -->|"General object storage"| OBJ["Object Store"]

    %% --- Branch A2: Orchestration ---
    A2 --> C
```
